title: Idle Tapper
description: A free idle clicker game. Tap to collect stars, buy upgrades, and watch your star count grow automatically. No login needed — runs in your browser.
resetConfirm: Reset all progress? This cannot be undone.

howToUse.label: Tap the star
howToUse.description: Click or tap the large ⭐ button to earn stars. Each tap earns stars based on your current tap power.

howToUse.label: Buy upgrades
howToUse.description: Spend stars on upgrades to multiply your tap power or unlock automatic star production.

howToUse.label: Go idle
howToUse.description: Auto-production upgrades generate stars every second — even when you are not clicking.

howToUse.label: Progress is saved
howToUse.description: Your stars and upgrades are saved automatically. Return anytime to pick up where you left off.

faq.question: Is my progress saved?
faq.answer: Yes. Your stars and purchased upgrades are automatically saved in your browser's local storage. Close the tab and come back later — your progress will be there.

faq.question: What are auto-production upgrades?
faq.answer: Some upgrades (Star Drone, Star Factory, Galactic Engine) generate stars every second without clicking. Stack them to grow your count faster.

faq.question: How do I reset my progress?
faq.answer: Click the Reset button at the bottom. You will be asked to confirm before all progress is cleared.

faq.question: Does this game send data anywhere?
faq.answer: No. All data is stored locally in your browser using localStorage. Nothing is sent to any server.

faq.question: What is the maximum tap power?
faq.answer: Buying both tap upgrades (Star Burst and Stellar Touch) multiplies your tap power to ×4 per click.
